title: clematis orientalis subsp. graveolens
intro: Clematis orientalis subsp. graveolens is a plant species within the Clematis genus, commonly known as Oriental Clematis or Sichuan Clematis, and is a flowering vine native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Clematis orientalis subsp. graveolens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
